message:
feat: implement batch-then-bisect merge queue (gt-i2vm)

Phase 2 core: batch assembly, rebase stack construction, test-on-tip,
fast-forward merge, and O(log N) binary bisection for culprit isolation.

New files:
- batch.go: BatchConfig, AssembleBatch, BuildRebaseStack, ProcessBatch,
  fastForwardBatch, bisectBatch with cumulative right-half bisection
- batch_test.go: 23 tests including integration tests with real git repos

Modified:
- engineer.go: Add Batch *BatchConfig to MergeQueueConfig
- git.go: Add MergeFFOnly for fast-forward-only merges

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
